# pirate-raiders-3d-2

A long intro section that pushes the marker block well away from the top of
the document, simulating a human having moved the generated block elsewhere
in the README after it was first inserted.

## Overview

Lots of prose here. Lots more prose. Even more prose to push the marker
further down the file so a fixed-offset scan would miss it.
